stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true about psychoactive substances and their use by pilots?

options.a: You are able to take them as long as it is 8 hours before your duty.
options.b: Pilots should not be under influence while on duty.
options.c: They can be used without informing an AME.
options.d: The pilot can fly under their influence provided he is not acting as pilot flying.
